headline: 3 Aerospace Stocks Ready to Ride the Aftermarket Rebound
summary: FEATURE  Aerospace stocks have been weak amid geopolitical tensions and higher oil prices. Some have started to rebound. Others, curiously, have lagged.  That’s an opportunity for investors. Citi has three stocks to check out.

headline: Tema ETFs launches $NASA, the first pure-play space fund with SpaceX exposure
summary: Yuri Kojian, Chief Investment Officer at Tema ETFs and portfolio manager of the new $NASA ETF, discusses the fund's launch and its unique position as the first pure-play space fund with direct SpaceX exposure. He delves into the portfolio's strategy, highlighting key holdings such as AST SpaceMobile ($SASTS), Rocket Lab ($RKLB), and Intuitive Machines ($LUNR), and explains why the fund excludes legacy aerospace companies like Boeing. Kojian also shares insights on the evolving space economy, including upcoming IPOs and the role of international players like OHB SE.

headline: Boeing’s SkyGrid Moves Into U Space And Advanced Air Mobility
summary: Boeing subsidiary SkyGrid agreed a partnership with Spain's ENAIRE to work on U-space and Advanced Air Mobility integration in Spanish airspace. Boeing Saudi Arabia and SkyGrid began a feasibility study for Advanced Air Mobility in Saudi Arabia with regulators and academic institutions. Both initiatives focus on future drone traffic management and automated aerial operations beyond Boeing's traditional commercial aircraft business, under ticker NYSE:BA.
